Home Our Process

Our Process

our process

how it works

OUR PROCESS

1

Premium Materials

Melamine- or laminate-coated 3/4" cabinetry-grade plywood. Built to last a lifetime.

2

Full Customization

Team colors, vinyl logos, and branding can be done.

3

Quick Ship

Every locker style is available in quick ship — 24" widths, one signature color per style. Ships in one month.

4

Custom-Built

Any size, any color, any wood, phenolic, or other materials. We build luxury lockers your way — custom-built in three months. 50% deposit to begin production.

Free Custom Design Consultation +

Every project starts with a free custom design consultation. We'll discuss your needs, space, budget, and vision to understand exactly what you're looking for. No obligation, just expert advice from 30+ years of experience.

5 Year Warranty +

We're confident in the quality of our wood sports lockers and back every locker with a 5 year warranty. Our unique modular design means damaged parts can be replaced individually—no need to replace the entire locker.

Quality Manufacturing +

We manufacture to the highest quality standards with premium materials and craftsmanship. Our family business is personally invested in every project—your success is our reputation.

Sport-Specific Solutions +

Every sport has unique equipment needs. We design lockers optimized for football, hockey, basketball, baseball, soccer, and lacrosse. From spacious football lockers to reinforced hockey lockers, we have solutions for every sport.

free

no obligation

Ready to Transform Your Locker Room?

Get a free custom design consultation. No obligation, just expert advice from 30+ years of experience.

Get Free Consultation View Our Work

Call us at 1 888 584 1444 or fill out our contact form

testimonials

trusted by champions

what our clients say

Head Coach

"These lockers aren't just furniture—they're an investment in our culture. Our recruits notice the difference immediately."

Athletic Director

"After 15 years, our PlayerStall lockers still look professional. The modular design has saved us thousands in repairs."

Facilities Manager

"The free custom design service made all the difference. They understood our space and created the perfect solution."

Hockey Coach

"The reinforced construction handles our heavy hockey gear perfectly. These lockers are built to last."

PlayerStall

Luxury custom-built wood lockers with full color options. Quick ship in one month (24" & 30" widths) or custom-built in three months. 50% deposit to begin. 30+ years of craftsmanship.

2934 200 Street, Langley, BC V2Z 2C1 Canada

sales@playerstall.com

1 888 584 1444

QUICK CONTACT INFO

Premium wood lockers at unbeatable prices. Quick ship in 2–4 weeks or custom in 8–12 weeks. We'll match any USA competitor's price. Call for a free quote.

Saturday: 10am to 2pm
